chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1642 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection at flag `A` 2. For hearing of CMA No.7034/2023 3. For hearing of main case 05-03-2024 Mr. Kashif Hussain Shaikh, Advocate for the Petitioners Mr. Agha Ather Hussain Pathan, Assistant Advocate General a/w ASI / I.O Abid Hussain of PS Dadloi.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- I.O has filed statement stating that case has been disposed of under ‘C’ class and order has been passed by the learned Civil Judge & Judicial Magistrate Pano Akil. Leaned counsel for the petitioner is satisfied and this petition is accordingly disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
